text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The first room, with its glass walls and focused group, gives off an atmosphere of collaboration and learning. I am both observer and participant, aware of the buzz of intent. Moving to the second space, the vibrant colors and bold designs stir my intellect. Here, the world of research and development is on display; innovation hangs in the air. I am inspired, my mind brimming with questions about the future of human and machine interaction.
